outline.headline: AI Presentation Systems Overview
outline.message: Introduction to AI systems for generating polished PPTX decks.

outline.headline: Data Ingestion in AI Systems
outline.message: AI systems ingest data through structured data connectors, document uploads, and cloud links.
evidence_queries: How do AI systems ingest data?
What are the common data ingestion methods in AI presentation systems?

outline.headline: AI System Architecture
outline.message: AI systems use a hybrid architecture for data ingestion, retrieval, and slide generation.
evidence_queries: What is the architecture of AI presentation systems?
How do AI systems structure their processes for slide generation?

outline.headline: Design Quality Strategies
outline.message: Comparison of template-first, rule-based, and free-form layout strategies in AI systems.
evidence_queries: What are the design quality strategies in AI systems?
How do different layout strategies compare in AI presentation systems?

outline.headline: Template-Driven Layout Benefits
outline.message: Template-driven layouts reduce layout failures and ensure brand consistency.
evidence_queries: What are the benefits of template-driven layouts?
How do template-driven layouts improve presentation quality?

outline.headline: Rule-Based Auto-Layout Features
outline.message: Rule-based layouts offer polish and predictability through curated slide types.
evidence_queries: What features do rule-based auto-layouts provide?
How do rule-based layouts enhance presentation design?

outline.headline: Free-Form Layout Constraints
outline.message: Free-form layouts propose structures with enforced readability and geometric constraints.
evidence_queries: What constraints are applied in free-form layouts?
How do free-form layouts maintain readability and structure?

outline.headline: Key Takeaways and Recommendations
outline.message: Summarize AI presentation system processes and recommend best practices for Oracle consultants.
